artistContext.name: Sophie
artistContext.summary: There are multiple artists that have performed under the name Sophie: 1) Sophie Xeon (September 17, 1986 – January 30, 2021), mononymously known by her stage name Sophie (stylized in all caps), was a Scottish producer and singer-songwriter who worked in Los Angeles and lived in Greece. She came to prominence in 2013 with her single "Bipp"/"Elle" and released "Lemonade"/"Hard" the following year. She worked closely with artists from the PC Music label and produced for acts including Charli XCX

writer.title: Sophie: A Profile of the Scottish Producer
writer.subtitle: Known for her contributions to electronic music and work with PC Music artists.
writer.author: V. Reyes
writer.excerpt: Sophie is a Scottish producer and singer-songwriter known for her work in electronic music. She came to prominence in 2013 with her single 'Bipp'/'Elle' and released 'Lemonade'/'Hard' the following year.

content.text: Sophie is a Scottish producer and singer-songwriter known for her work in electronic music. She came to prominence in 2013 with her single 'Bipp'/'Elle' and released 'Lemonade'/'Hard' the following year.

Her work is characterized by its experimental nature and falls under genres such as Bubblegum Bass, Electronic, Experimental, Post-Club, and UK Bass. Sophie worked closely with artists from the PC Music label and produced for acts including Charli XCX.

Sophie has released several notable works including the albums PRODUCT, SOPHIE, OIL OF EVERY PEARL'S UN-INSIDES NON-STOP REMIX ALBUM, and OIL OF EVERY PEARL'S UN-INSIDES. Her recent single Sunscreen was released in August 2025.

Her production style and contributions to the electronic music scene have influenced a number of artists in the genre. Sophie's work continues to be recognized for its innovative approach to sound and production techniques.
